mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE id = ?
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO videos (title, description, category_id, user_id, video_url, object_key, size, status, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count, view_count, hot_score, create_time, update_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE id IN (%s)
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO video_like (video_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)
mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM video_like WHERE video_id = ? AND user_id = ? LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_like WHERE video_id = ? AND user_id = ?
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + ?, 0), hot_score = like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5 + favorite_count * 4 + view_count + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id =?

UPDATE videos SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count + ?, 0), hot_score = like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5 + favorite_count * 4 + view_count + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id =?

UPDATE videos SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count + ?, 0), hot_score = like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5 + favorite_count * 4 + view_count + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id = ?

UPDATE videos SET view_count = view_count + ?, hot_score = like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5 + favorite_count * 4 + view_count + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW())) WHERE id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE title LIKE ?

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE title LIKE ? ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE title LIKE ? ORDER BY hot_score DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE category_id = ?

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE category_id = ? ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos WHERE category_id = ? ORDER BY hot_score DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos ORDER BY hot_score DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, title, description, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, video_url AS videoUrl, object_key AS objectKey, size, status, like_count AS likesCount, comment_count AS commentCount, favorite_count AS favoriteCount, view_count AS viewCount, hot_score AS hotScore, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM videos ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
